category_sources: Official icoutils homepage describes command-line programs for extracting and converting Windows icon and cursor files.
source_facts.description says it creates and extracts Microsoft Windows icons and cursors.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the primary documentation surface, with introduction, program descriptions, requirements, and download links.
repo_sources: No official source-control repository URL was confirmed from source_facts; official homepage links to Savannah project/download pages but not a clearly verified VCS URL.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes ICO/CUR conversion and extraction from Windows executables and libraries.
source_facts.executables lists CLI tools such as `icotool` and `wrestool`.
